title: Debug assertion sqlite3MemCompare: Assertion `pMem1->enc==pMem2->enc || pMem1->db->mallocFailed' failed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, c1 TEXT NOT NULL, c2 BLOB);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES (UNHEX('00'), UNHEX('01'));
INSERT INTO t2(c3) VALUES ((SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE id = 1));
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE CAST(SUBSTRING(c3, 1) AS CHAR) > '0';
key_bug_features: SELECT with UTF16 encoding triggers assertion error
